
<center>

<h1>Welcome to LISSY !</h1>

</center>

<br>

Welcome to Lissy, this will be the landing page of the new interactivfe website to Guide the users on LISSY, and have some examples on both R and Stata, as well as section og Getting Started and on FAQs,

**News and Upcoming Events:**

-   As usual no Data on Portugal
-   Thousands of Datasets are still there nevertheless.

Project announcements: [LIS](https://www.lisdatacenter.org/) • Please connect with via email, and check our Newsletter.
